## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the messaging and positioning for GrowthX's Series A announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aim for end of next week for announcement, balancing urgency with proper preparation](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Focus on GrowthX's unique story: profitable AI company, innovative internal tooling, strong client results](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Need to clarify roles/responsibilities in content production workflow, especially CM layer](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
  - [Website updates required: About Us, Newsroom, press kit, and alignment with new messaging](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)

## Topics

### Announcement Timing and Strategy

  - [Targeting end of next week for announcement, avoiding tax day (April 15th)](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Madrona (investor) offering PR support, but team prefers to craft own narrative](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating FOMO for potential clients and setting up for future Series B](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Aim for TechCrunch coverage, LinkedIn posts, and company blog at minimum](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Messaging and Positioning

  - [Highlight GrowthX as a profitable AI company with strong revenue and client results](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Focus on bringing "developer-like productivity" to knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Emphasize internal tooling ("cursor for content") without fully exposing product details](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Balance agency services story with hints at future product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Matthew to draft mock article to refine messaging and identify potential questions](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### Website and Content Updates

  - [New pages needed: About Us, Newsroom (with press kit), and updated messaging](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Consider adding SEO-focused pages to demonstrate capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [Jason to implement updates once messaging is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

### Organizational Structure and Workflows

  - [Clarify roles of Managing Editors (MEs), Content Managers (CMs), and potential writer layer](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [Debate over who should "push buttons" on content workflows (CMs vs. new layer)](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)
  - [Need to formalize contractor relationships and reduce reliance on ad-hoc freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Bridget identified 51 active Upwork contracts that need review/potential conversion](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Ideal workflow: CMs use AI tools, polish/refine content, then MEs do final expert edit](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Freelancers should only be used for specific, contained projects without system access](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Need to set clear expectations for CMs about using AI tools as part of their core role](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to write mock article/press release for team review](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Finalize messaging and positioning strategy by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Jason to update website with new pages and aligned messaging once finalized](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Bridget to review Upwork contracts, consider converting qualified freelancers to CMs](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
  - [Clarify and document roles/responsibilities for content team (MEs, CMs, freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
  - [Determine press release distribution method (possibly through Madrona's PR firm)](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Set target announcement date (likely end of next week) and work backwards on tasks](https://fathom.video/share/LAVi6WUjsVbkLfc9zsTMeFjLNGXZL-Dr?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
